visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are standing in a brightly lit indoor warehouse or parking facility. One woman wears a white fleece jacket and the other wears a blue beret with a light blue quilted vest. They stand behind a silver metal shopping cart overflowing with packaged grocery items like cereal and milk. They are holding up small white rectangular cards with red and blue logos, smiling with high energy and gesturing towards the cards. (2) The scene shifts to a close-up of a hand holding a miniature version of a membership card. The background shows a person in a blue staff vest standing near a concrete wall. The lighting is bright studio-style artificial light. The card is held between a thumb and forefinger to emphasize its small scale compared to the hand. (3) The women demonstrate the functionality of the card. One woman holds the small card against a metal shopping cart to show it is magnetic. They use active hand gestures, pointing at the card and then at their smartphones. The background contains industrial elements like concrete pillars and distant shopping carts. (4) The women continue to interact excitedly, waving at the camera and laughing. The final shot shows one woman leaning her head playfully on the handle of the shopping cart, holding the mini card close to her face while looking directly at the lens with a pouty, cute expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 好市多超可愛免費迷你會員卡. [Subtitle]: 我的會員卡. [Subtitle]: 這是我的會員卡. (2) [Subtitle]: 為什麼你的會員卡這麼小一張. [Variety]: 這麼小一張. (3) [Subtitle]: 好市多超級迷你會員卡. (4) [Slogan]: 找藍色衣服的工作人員. (5) [Slogan]: 不用消費 就可以 免費兌換!. (6) [Subtitle]: 超可愛的. (7) [Subtitle]: 你只要幫他們的臉書或IG按讚. (8) [Subtitle]: 就可以免費拿到. (9) [Subtitle]: 而且他還是磁鐵. (10) [Subtitle]: 冰箱貼. (11) [Subtitle]: 貼在冰箱比如說你的購物清單. (12) [Slogan]: 要去好市多買東西了!. (13) [Subtitle]: 你可以貼在他們冷藏區的櫃架. (14) [Variety]: ??. (15) [Subtitle]: 啊!? 什麼. (16) [Subtitle]: 你當然是自己收好啦. (17) [Variety]: 數量有限. (18) [Subtitle]: 好可愛喔 大卡跟附卡. (19) [Subtitle]: 那可以用這個當會員卡嗎?. (20) [Subtitle]: 不行. (21) [Subtitle]: 這麼迷你的卡有看過嗎. [Subtitle]: 好小一張. [Subtitle]: 好小好小!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 staff member briefly visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a white fluffy fleece jacket; the second woman wears a dark blue beret and a light blue vest over a teal long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An industrial warehouse environment, likely a Costco parking or entrance area, featuring concrete floors, large support pillars, and rows of metal shopping carts.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with two female voices speaking in high-arousal, energetic Mandarin Chinese, characterized by rapid speech rates and rising pitch contours. An upbeat, major-mode electronic pop track with a steady 124 BPM synthetic drum beat serves as the background. The vocal clarity is high, indicating professional post-production. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers a transition into a more descriptive phase. One voice explains the acquisition process with clear articulation while the BGM continues at a consistent volume. The music features bright synthesizer pads and a driving rhythmic section. (3) The vocal track becomes fragmented with short bursts of laughter and playful exclamations. The intensity of the speech remains high, with frequent pitch modulation. A cartoonish 'pop' sound effect coincides with the demonstration of the magnetic card. (4) The track ends with a synchronized vocal farewell and a high-pitched giggle. The background music maintains its energy until a final percussive hit concludes the video. The overall mix is clean with minimal ambient noise, emphasizing the vocal-music overlap.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about a limited-time promotional giveaway at Costco (a miniature membership card magnet) and provide a step-by-step tutorial on how to obtain it by engaging with the brand's social media. It uses high-energy interaction and visual demonstrations of the product's utility as a refrigerator magnet to drive audience interest.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of a free gift from Costco and instructions to follow their social media accounts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging social media promo focusing on 'kawaii' (cute) culture and brand loyalty through small collectibles.
